spec_match.rationale: Two lanes (with-#root vs bare) over the same SVG URL model the v137 change; an icon grid below uses the bare form at scale.

interactive.rationale: Preset chips, free-text URL input, both lanes update on input, status flips ok/fail based on bbox measurement.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises side-by-side lanes, preset switching, and a bare-URL icon grid — all present.

edge_cases.rationale: Default url points at /v137/.../sprite-router/star.svg which does not exist — status opens in `fetch failed` state. Also missing: cross-origin URL, sprite.svg with multiple symbols.

references.rationale: Correct chromestatus 5128141573718016 and SVG2 spec links present.

design_system.rationale: All variables, lane-tags pair bg+color, no raw hex outside icon data URLs.

openQuestions.title: Seed the URL input with a working asset
openQuestions.detail: Default value points at sprite-router/star.svg which does not exist; page opens in a `not rendered: fetch failed` state. Either inline a star.svg into the folder or seed the input with a working data: URL from ICONS.star.

openQuestions.title: Add a cross-origin URL probe
openQuestions.detail: Add a preset that points at an https URL on a different origin to demonstrate how CORS interacts with the new root-resolution.

summary: Best-engineered concept in the feature; only first-impression bug is the default URL pointing at a non-existent file.
